title: Squirrel Removal in Castle Hill, Bronx | $900 - $2,500

Our local expertise in Bronx architecture—from pre-war buildings to single-family homes near the Cross Bronx Expressway—ensures we identify and seal every potential entry point for lasting results.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Castle Hill?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Castle Hill typically costs between $900 and $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage. This includes humane trapping, exclusion work, and sanitization. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes for all Castle Hill properties.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to squirrel problems in Castle Hill?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for Castle Hill residents experiencing squirrel emergencies. Squirrels can cause significant damage quickly by chewing wires and insulation, so we prioritize rapid response throughout the Bronx, typically arriving within 24 hours of your call.

faqs.question: Are squirrels common in Castle Hill homes?
faqs.answer: Yes, Castle Hill's tree-lined streets, proximity to Pugsley Creek Park and Soundview Park, and mix of older residential buildings make it particularly attractive to squirrels seeking shelter. Attics, soffits, and roof vents in Castle Hill homes provide ideal nesting spots, especially during fall and winter months.

faqs.question: What does your squirrel removal process include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive service includes a thorough inspection of your Castle Hill property, humane live trapping and removal of all squirrels, identification and sealing of all entry points, attic cleanup and sanitization, insulation damage repair if needed, and a warranty against re-entry. We ensure your home is completely squirrel-proofed for long-term protection.
